text.title: Product Explainability Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for Product Explainability. Required because complexity=medium. Each step has input / action / output and (where applicable) a decision-gate.

step.name: check-preconditions
step.input: `## Applies If` items, `## Skip If` items, prior-cycle artefact (if any).
step.action: Verify ALL applies-if items hold and NO skip-if item fires.
step.output: boolean `proceed`; if false, log skip reason and exit.
step.decision-gate: If `proceed == false`, conclude with `skip-this-methodology` and stop.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Pull each input artefact from its named source; verify freshness (e.g., ≤7 days where applicable).
step.output: structured input bundle ready for step 3.
step.decision-gate: If any input missing or stale, defer the cycle and record the gap.

step.name: apply-core-rules
step.action: Apply each testable rule in order; record any rule violation with concrete evidence.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Render the artefact (shape defined by JSON Schema in `02-output-contract.xml`).

step.name: validate-and-route
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-product-explainability.py` against the artefact. On pass, route to downstream consumer; on fail, surface violations.
step.output: validator exit code 0 (pass) or 1 (fail) + violation list.
step.decision-gate: If exit != 0, return artefact for revision; do not advance.
